title: Trump Tries to Quiet Claims Among Supporters That Israel Dragged Him Into War
summary_full: Many of President Trump’s allies have urged him and his Make America Great Again movement to shift away from their close ties to Israel and military entanglements in the Middle East.
summary_public: Many of President Trump’s allies have urged him and his Make America Great Again movement to shift away from their close ties to Israel and military entanglements in the Middle East.
